data.title: Inventor creates modified hospital bed with USB charging ports to reduce boredom, fall risks, and injuries.
data.description: In Bradenton, Fla., on August 22, 2025, an inventor shared that they saw a need for hospital beds to have USB charging ports. This idea led to the creation of SMART CONNECT, aimed at reducing boredom, fall risks, and injuries in hospitals.
Intel CEO to meet with Trump for ongoing discussions - CNBC. $INTC

data.title: Dow jumps 900 points as Fed hints at rate cut, hitting all-time high. Nvidia earnings in focus.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones reached a record high amid growing optimism about a potential interest rate reduction at the September Federal Reserve meeting. The stock market surged with the Dow gaining 900 points, reflecting investors' confidence in a rate cut. The positive market activity was also driven by anticipation of Nvidia's earnings report. The news of the Dow's impressive climb was covered live by Investor's Business Daily.

Gaza crisis ‘has to be unacceptable to the world’ - UNICEF UNICEF Spokesperson Tess Ingram tells CGTN that a ceasefire is desperately needed to distribute aid to famine-struck Gaza – and explains how difficult it is to get aid at the moment.

data.title: Branded Legacy partners with Stanford's Dr. Eran Bendavid to combat opioid crisis with evidence-led innovation.
data.description: Utilizing data-driven approaches to address the worldwide opioid crisis, groundbreaking initiatives are being implemented to combat this pressing issue. These evidence-led innovations aim to tackle the escalating crisis on a global scale. With opioid-related deaths reaching staggering numbers in recent years, the need for effective strategies is more critical than ever. By leveraging evidence-based solutions, organizations are striving to make a significant impact in fighting the opioid epidemic and saving lives. This forward-thinking approach signifies a pivotal shift in addressing the crisis through innovative and data-informed measures.

data.title: EastGroup Properties increases quarterly dividend by 10.7% to $1.55 per share from $1.40 per share.
data.description: In Jackson, Mississippi on August 22, 2025, EastGroup Properties, Inc. disclosed an uptick of 10.7% in its quarterly dividend. This decision, approved by the Board of Directors, elevates the dividend from $1.40 per share to $1.55 per share. Shareholders can anticipate the increased dividend payout in the upcoming period.

data.title: Get ready for Halloween with Corpse Bride decor celebrating 20th anniversary. Life-size characters and accents available.
data.description: In honor of the 20th anniversary of Tim Burton's Corpse Bride, Dallas is prepping for Halloween with life-size animated characters and decorative accents inspired by the film. The celebration will showcase iconic figures like Emily, the Corpse Bride, and Victor Van Dort. The event is scheduled for Aug. 22, 2025, and promises to bring the beloved characters to life. This initiative aims to attract fans and Halloween enthusiasts alike, offering a unique and immersive experience. Don't miss out on the chance to engage with these familiar faces in a new and exciting way. Get ready to step into the world of Corpse Bride like never before!
YouGov: UK longer-term inflation expectations fell to 3.9% from 4.2% to their level in February.

data.title: High Roller Technologies regains NYSE listing compliance with approved plan. Las Vegas-based company operates High Roller & Fruta online casino brands.
data.description: Today, in Las Vegas, Nevada, High Roller Technologies, known as High Roller, and the Company, revealed their strategy to meet NYSE American's ongoing listing criteria has been approved by NYSE American LLC. High Roller is the operator behind the acclaimed online casino labels High Roller and Fruta. The Company’s aim is to maintain compliance with NYSE American’s standards and the announcement signifies a positive step towards this goal. The plan's acceptance indicates the Company's commitment to adhering to regulatory guidelines set by NYSE American LLC.

data.title: 180 Degree Capital reports shareholders approved all-stock merger with Mount Logan Capital Inc in a special meeting today.
data.description: In Montclair, New Jersey on August 22, 2025, 180 Degree Capital Corp. (NASDAQ: TURN) disclosed details from its shareholder meeting regarding the all-stock merger with Mount Logan Capital Inc. The meeting, known as the Merger Special Meeting, took place earlier in the day.

data.title: Inventor from Madison, Ga. creates new spinner bait lure called THE SPINNER HOOP for fishing; offers realistic action.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on August 22, 2025, an inventor from Madison, Ga. discussed the creation of a novel spinner bait lure called THE SPINNER HOOP. The inventor aimed to enhance the fishing experience by designing a lure that provides realistic movement in the water to attract fish to the angler's location. The innovative design sought to appeal to anglers with its unique features and improved functionality.

data.title: Bitcoin's value could soar to $200K due to US retirement plans driving demand, surpassing the impact of spot Bitcoin ETFs.
data.description: According to a top analyst at Bitwise, the potential addition of cryptocurrency to 401(k) retirement plans could have a greater impact on Bitcoin than the expected launch of US spot Bitcoin ETFs in 2024. This suggests that the incorporation of crypto into retirement accounts may be a significant development for Bitcoin's future trajectory.

data.title: Covid vaccine critic appointed to lead federal review team amid protest from CDC staff over misinformation.
data.description: Members of the panel have received an extensive mandate, despite multiple requests from employees at the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention to urge Robert F. Kennedy Jr. to cease spreading inaccurate information.
